mapper.sql: category_id, category_name, parent_id, sort, status, create_by, create_time, update_by, update_time, del_flag
mapper.select: SELECT FROM product_category WHERE category_id = #{categoryId} AND del_flag = 0

SELECT c.category_id, c.category_name, c.parent_id, c.sort, c.status, p.product_id, p.product_name, p.price, p.stock, p.image, p.description, p.status AS product_status, p.create_time AS product_create_time FROM product_category c LEFT JOIN product p ON c.category_id = p.category_id AND p.del_flag = 0 WHERE c.category_id = #{categoryId} AND c.del_flag = 0 ORDER BY p.create_time DESC
mapper.update: UPDATE product_category SET del_flag = 1 WHERE category_id = #{categoryId}
